name: @narada2/operator-routing-mcp
description: User Site operator routing MCP surface for transcript-to-target routing decisions and inbox fallback packaging.

scripts.test: pnpm build && node dist/test/protocol-smoke.test.js && node dist/test/operator-routing-mcp.test.js && node --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning dist/test/site-fabric-routing-e2e.test.js
